login.title: Partner Login
login.subtitle: Access your partner dashboard
login.legalPrefix: By click continue, you agree to our

register.title: Kora konti
register.subtitle: Shyiramo ibisobanuro byawe kugira ngo utangire
register.legalPrefix: By click continue, you agree to our
register.successMessage: Murakoze cyane kwiyandikisha. Kugirango ufungure konti yawe, nyamuneka reba imeri yawe hanyuma ukande kuri link yo kugenzura twawohereje.
register.passwordTooShort: Ijambo ry'ibanga rigomba kuba rifite nibura inyuguti 6

twoFactor.title: Twe-Factor Authentication
twoFactor.descriptionCode: Shyiramo kode y'imibare 6 ukoresheje porogaramu yawe ya authenticator
twoFactor.descriptionRecovery: Shyiramo imwe muri kode zawe zo kwiyandikisha kugira ngo ushyiremo
twoFactor.invalidRecoveryCode: Please enter a valid recovery code (format: XXXXX-XXXXX)
twoFactor.helpText: Ufite ikibazo? Vugana n'ubufasha kugira ngo ubone ubufasha.

setup.subtitle: Reka tugutegure. Nyamuneka hitamo ubwoko bwa konti yawe kugirango ukomeze.
setup.clinicDescription: Ndi umuvuzi cyangwa ikigo cy'ubuvuzi gifite abaganga benshi
setup.labDescription: Ndi umukozi wa Laboratwari cyangwa ikigo cy'ubuvuzi bw'indwara z'ibyorezo
setup.individualDescription: Ndi umuganga w'inzobere mu by'ubuzima cyangwa umushakashatsi ku giti cye
setup.setupError: Yananiwe kurangiza gahunda ya Guma mu rugo. Please try again.

messages.errorFallback: Yananiwe kohereza ubutumwa bugufi kuri e-mail. Please try again.

success.title: Check your email
success.description: Nyamuneka reba agasanduku kawe k'indangamuntu hanyuma ukurikize amabwiriza kugira ngo uhindure ijambo ry'ibanga ryawe. Iki gitaramo kizarangira mu gihe kitarenze isaha 1.
success.retry: Ko nta email twabonye? Gerageza nanone

form.title: Wibagiwe ijambo ry'ibanga ryawe?
form.description: Shyiramo email yawe hanyuma tuzakoherereza umurongo wo gusubiza inyuma.

messages.errorFallback: Yananiwe gusubiza ijambo ry'ibanga (password). Link ishobora kuba yararangiye.

form.title: Reset password yawe
form.description: Shyiramo ijambo ry'ibanga ryawe rishya hepfo.

messages.invalidLink: Invalid confirmation link. Nyamuneka koresha link ya email yawe.
messages.errorFallback: Yananiwe kwemeza email ye. Link ishobora kuba yararangiye.

state.loadingDescription: Please wait while we verify your email address...
state.successDescription: Your email has been successfully verified.
state.errorDescription: Ntabwo twabashije kugenzura aderesi ya email yawe.

success.nextStep: Ubu ushobora kwinjira muri konti yawe ukoresheje email yawe n'ijambo ry'ibanga (password).

error.helpText: Niba ibi bikomeje, hamagara ubufasha cyangwa wongere wiyandikishe.
